assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures opt.UserInteraction.ErrorUrl to a specific error page path
An error page calls GetErrorContextAsync(errorId) to retrieve error details from IIdentityServerInteractionService
The error page displays the Error code and RequestId to the user but does not render ErrorDescription directly in the view
assertions.rationale: View shows ErrorCode and RequestId. ErrorDescription is explicitly not rendered and there's a comment explaining why.

assertions.assertion: The error page logs the full error details including ErrorDescription using ILogger at Debug level
assertions.rationale: Code calls _logger.LogDebug with Error, ErrorDescription, RequestId, and ClientId.
